This model has a place for an inscription that is displayed to each user, and a message that is shown only to the winner. This model can also be configured to have a time limit of 1-60 minutes.

The pet is placed into suspended animation, unable to move, but still able to dream -- and to have nightmares, which cause the pet to lose all of its Happiness. Pets kept in this container for more than 90 days escape and are lost. One use only.

recipe_23151_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy through a simple ceremony. It must be performed at noon [game time] on a perfectly clear day. It can be performed repeatedly on different days. Each performance permanently increases your Maximum Tempest Energy +1.
recipe_23152_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a mysterious ceremony. It must be performed at midnight [game time] on a new moon [real world]. It need only be performed once; the effects are permanent.
recipe_23153_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a simple ritual. The ritual need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed at precisely 4AM [game time] while in a sandstorm.
recipe_23154_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a supposedly-ancient (but actually fairly modern) ritual. The ritual need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed outdoors while suffering from at least two diseases and two curses.
recipe_23155_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a simple but extremely lengthy ritual. The ritual need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. Must be performed near a meditation pillar.
recipe_23156_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through an extraordinarily painful ritual. The ritual need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. Must be performed outdoors while suffering from 20 broken bones.
recipe_23157_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a simple ritual that expands your understanding. The ritual need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. Must be performed outdoors while fully submerged in water.
recipe_23158_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a ritual that expands your understanding. The ritual need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed outdoors while severely intoxicated and suffering from a pineal juice hangover.
recipe_23159_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 by reciting elven verses that can expand your mind. The recitation need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed outdoors while enjoying post-coital bliss.
recipe_23160_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 by reciting an ancient elven story that can expand your mind. The recitation need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed outdoors while surrounded by at least 20 growing garden plants.
recipe_23161_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a simple ceremony said to expand your mind. The recitation need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed while sitting in shallow water after having just licked a toxic frog.
recipe_23162_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a primitive ceremony. The recitation need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed while suffering 10+ damage-over-time effects.
recipe_23163_Description: Increase your Maximum Tempest Energy +5 through a simple ceremony in a crowded place. The recitation need only be performed once; the effects are permanent. It must be performed while around at least 20 other players while undressed and unashamed.
recipe_23201_Description: Analyze a piece of equipment to study how it works. The item is not lost or damaged. You can only study each type of item one time -- further study of similar items gains you nothing. You can only perform Hoplology Research once every 5 minutes.
recipe_23251_Description: Study the bones, organs, or body parts of a deceased creature to get a hint about your future. You may not like what you see, but the odds of a good omen are in your favor.
recipe_23252_Description: Study the bones, organs, or body parts of a deceased creature to get a hint about your future. You may not like what you see, but the odds of a good omen are in your favor. This augury tends to have more potent futures -- both good and ill -- than the Beginner's Augury.
recipe_23253_Description: Study the bones, organs, or body parts of a deceased creature to get a hint about your future. You may not like what you see, but the odds of a good omen are in your favor. This augury tends to have more potent futures -- both good and ill -- than the Basic Augury. It is also more sensitive to the body part used, with more possible outcomes for certain parts.
recipe_23254_Description: Study the bones, organs, or body parts of a deceased creature to get a hint about your future. You may not like what you see, but the odds of a good omen are in your favor. This augury tends to have more potent futures -- both good and ill -- than the Advanced Augury. Like the Advanced Augury, it is sensitive to the body part used, with more possible outcomes for certain parts.
recipe_23271_Description:
Perform a mind-altering ritual so that you can perceive newly-spawned monsters 2 seconds before they actually appear.

The effect does not wear off, but whenever you die there's a 5% chance that it will end.
recipe_23272_Description:
Perform a mind-altering ritual so that you can perceive newly-spawned monsters 4 seconds before they actually appear.

The effect does not wear off, but whenever you die there's a 5% chance that it will end.
recipe_23273_Description:
Perform a mind-altering ritual so that you can perceive newly-spawned corporeal undead 10 seconds before they actually appear.

The effect does not wear off, but whenever you die there's a 5% chance that it will end.

recipe_23603_Description: Attach a tap to a barrel of beer or hard liquor and deploy it. The barrel will IMMEDIATELY APPEAR near you, and any players can drink from it. The barrel will persist until all alcohol is consumed (or very slowly evaporates). The barrel cannot be reused. If the barrel is inscribed prior to being tapped, the inscription will be shown to all who drink from it.

recipe_26695_Description: The height of generic floral scents. Pleasant but forgettable.
recipe_26696_Description: A potent floral scent that features red roses plucked at the height of their crimson yearning. Or so it smells.
recipe_26697_Description: The elven lily provides a base scent for this candle, and the bitter-cold winterhue flower accentuates it.
recipe_26698_Description: A scent that brings forth happy visions of flowers basking in the sun.
recipe_26700_Description: A heady floral smell that challenges the olfactory sense of flowers, and what is a flower, really?
recipe_26701_Description: A flower candle that you can never get tired of smelling.
recipe_26708_Description: It smells like burned bacon! Which isn't a great smell. It makes you really want to eat some bacon, though.
recipe_26710_Description: The lovely aroma of bacon reminds you of how tasty bacon is.
recipe_26712_Description: This smell is a cultivated bacon odor, accentuating the highs and diminishing the lows, making real bacon taste incredible.
recipe_26714_Description: This smells less like bacon than some candles, but the smell synergizes with real bacon scent in an incredible way.
recipe_26723_Description: An almost-overpowering odor of the sea. It reminds you to hold your breath underwater.
recipe_26725_Description: A tantalizing reminder of the beach.
recipe_26727_Description: You can almost hear the ocean waves when you smell this pleasing sea-inspired aroma.
recipe_26729_Description: It so accurately replicates the sensory experience of the ocean that those afraid of water should stay clear.
recipe_26738_Description: The smell of sand in wind. Because there's nothing like smelling a sandstorm in the air to quicken one's pace.
recipe_26740_Description: A bouquet of aromas that bring to mind sprinting in the endless desert.
recipe_26742_Description: This delicate smell evokes the desert without actually having any icky desert smells.
recipe_26744_Description: Evokes the wind in your hair (even if you have no hair) to facilitate an incredible runner's high.
recipe_26753_Description: This smells like a cold, cold, morning in a fairly-unpleasant-smelling place.
recipe_26755_Description: This smells like a warm drink on a cold, cold morning.
recipe_26756_Description: This smells like a warm drink on a cold, cold morning.
recipe_26757_Description: This smells like waking up to a cold dawn around a warming campfire, with a loving pet wolf-dog nearby who's happy you're finally awake.
recipe_26759_Description: Brings to mind the timeless beauty of a frozen landscape before shattering that image with sensations of warmth.
recipe_26768_Description: A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.
recipe_26770_Description: A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.
recipe_26772_Description: A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.
recipe_26774_Description: A heady bouquet encompassing the beauty of both life and death. It has a slightly hallucinogenic effect.
recipe_26777_Description: A smoky, musty candle that evokes the danger of fire.
recipe_26779_Description: An almost-smoky smell with an earthy undertone, suggesting a forest fire.
recipe_26781_Description: An intoxicating aroma of autumn flavors mixed with potent hallucinogens.
recipe_26783_Description: A pleasant odor reminiscent of burning hickory.
recipe_26787_Description: The bitter smokiness of a forest fire combined with the pleasant aroma of cooking meat.
recipe_26795_Description: A candle that enhances necromantic power. It is also used in many other illegal and/or immoral rituals.
recipe_26901_Description: A mildly perfumed wax that helps ensure mating success with bees or wasps.
recipe_26902_Description: A pungent smelling wax that helps ensure mating success with bees or wasps.
recipe_26903_Description: An oily wax that smells great to bees. Used to help ensure mating success with bees or wasps.

Makes one piece of equipment permanently look like another piece of equipment.

recipe_9001_Description: Ties your soul to a particular Teleportation Circle so that you can return to it via Teleportation magic. You must be standing on a Teleportation Circle.
recipe_9002_Description: Sends you back to the Teleportation Circle you are bound to. You must be standing on a Teleportation Circle.
recipe_9003_Description: Sends you back to the Teleportation Circle you are bound to. You do not need to be in a Teleportation Circle to use this technique, but this technique has a 60-minute cooldown before it can be used again.
recipe_9005_Description: Teleports you to the entrance of the area you're currently in.
recipe_9006_Description: Sends you back to the Teleportation Circle you last Recalled to. (Normally this would be the one you are bound to, unless you've bound to a different location since your last teleport.) You must be standing on a Teleportation Circle.
recipe_9007_Description: Sends you to a Teleportation Circle that you have recalled to relatively recently. You must be standing on a Teleportation Circle.
recipe_9008_Description: Sends you to the Teleportation Circle that you have recalled from the highest number of times in your life. You must be standing on a Teleportation Circle.

recipe_9011_Description: Teleports you to the entrance of the area you're currently in.
recipe_9012_Description: Teleports you to wherever your guild's home position is set to. Costs 2 Guild Credits. Your guild must have a Guild Hall in order to use this recipe.
recipe_9013_Description: Teleports you to the Serbule docks. Can be used once per hour.

recipe_9015_Description: Creates a dimensional rift that leads to the gates of Statehelm. Any number of players can enter the rift. It lasts for two minutes. This technique has a 60-minute cooldown before it can be used again.

recipe_9020_Description: Sends you back to the alternate Teleportation Circle you are bound to. You do not need to be in a Teleportation Circle to use this technique, but this technique has a 60-minute cooldown before it can be used again.
